items.title: ⚠️ The conflict in Iran underscores the importance of commodities as a portfolio diversifier.…
items.content:
⚠️ The conflict in Iran underscores the importance of commodities as a portfolio diversifier.

Deglobalization, large fiscal deficits, demographic shifts, climate change and heightened geopolitical tensions are all reshaping the dynamics of inflation. In this environment, upside risks are persistent; the conflict in Iran is simply the latest catalyst.
Supply shocks are particularly challenging for portfolios because stagflation tends to hurt both equities and bonds simultaneously. Commodities, as real assets, are less negatively impacted. In many cases, including today, surging commodity prices are themselves the source of supply-driven inflation.

As markets transition toward a regime that more closely resembles the 1980s than the 2010s (a period in which energy more often exhibited a negative correlation with a traditional 60/40 portfolio), the strategic case for holding such assets strengthens.
伊朗衝突凸顯大宗商品作為投資組合分散工具的重要性。去全球化、大規模財政赤字、人口結構轉變、氣候變遷以及地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，都在重塑通膨的動態。在這樣的環境下，上行風險持續存在；伊朗衝突僅是最新的催化劑。
供給衝擊對投資組合而言特別具有挑戰性，因為停滯性通膨往往會同時對股票與債券造成傷害。大宗商品作為實質資產，受到的負面影響較小。在許多情況下，包括當前，飆漲的大宗商品價格本身就是供給驅動型通膨的來源。
隨著市場逐步轉向一個更貼近 1980 年代而非 2010 年代的環境（在那段期間，能源資產與傳統 60/40 投資組合之間往往呈現負相關），持有這類資產的策略性理由也隨之增強。 @parisprogram

items.title: European equities are only down 0.6% in early trading. It’s a case of it could have been worse…
items.content:
European equities are only down 0.6% in early trading. It’s a case of it could have been worse as the resumption of normal operations at Oman’s Mina Al Fahal oil terminal provides some relief to markets.

An element of a buy the dip mentality remains. However, the resumption of operations is not much of an incremental positive as by definition it has just returned the situation to its original state. It has done little to improve the outlook for flows through the Strait of Hormuz. This also comes amid news that Iran targeted fuel tanks at the Muharraq facility in Bahrain, and Chinese refiners reportedly begin to cancel agreed refined fuel export cargoes.

The newsflow continues to lean negatively for the conflict, with little clarity on how feasible an off ramp is, which suggests more downside for European stocks.
歐洲股市早盤僅下跌 0.6%。這算是情況本可能更糟的一個例子，因為 Oman 的 Mina Al Fahal 石油碼頭恢復正常運作，為市場帶來一些喘息空間。逢低買進的心態依然存在。然而，營運恢復並未帶來太多額外的正面效益，因為就其定義而言，這只是讓情況回歸到原本的狀態。
這對於改善經由荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）的運輸前景幫助甚微。此外，在伊朗鎖定巴林 Muharraq 設施的燃料槽發動攻擊的消息傳出之際，據報導中國煉油商也開始取消已議定的成品油出口貨載。相關消息持續對衝突情勢呈現負面傾向，且對於可行的退場機制仍缺乏明確性，這暗示歐洲股市將面臨更多下行壓力。 @parisprogram

items.title: The grim narrative that crypto has been pressured in recent months might have been worsened by…
items.content:
The grim narrative that crypto has been pressured in recent months might have been worsened by the Iran conflict, Richard Abbey and John Authers write. But Bitcoin has weathered the storm, up more than 5% since the war started.

Surprisingly, gold — the quintessential haven asset — is down by about 2% over that period. It would be far too early to conclude that there’s been safe-haven regime change, as bullion is still up by nearly 20% for the year. But Bitcoin’s curious show of strength needs to be explained.
Its resurgence owes in part to support from global markets after traders rushed to buy the dip following Trump’s comments on the imminent end of the Iranian conflict, according to FxPro’s Alex Kuptsikevich. This scramble doesn’t suggest a flight to safety so much as a (probably premature) bet on an imminent easing of geopolitical tensions.

The resilience remains significant. Charlie Morris of ByteTree notes that, like Bitcoin, software is virtual, and wars are a reminder that the digital world is more insulated from disruption than the real one. Their relationship has strengthened in recent months. If it holds, the ripples running through the software industry amid AI disruption fears may signal where Bitcoin goes from here.
Richard Abbey 與 John Authers 指出，近幾個月加密貨幣面臨壓力的悲觀論調，可能因伊朗衝突而進一步惡化。但比特幣（Bitcoin）已安然度過這場風暴，自戰爭爆發以來上漲超過 5%。令人意外的是，黃金——典型的避險資產——同期卻下跌約 2%。
現在斷言避險資產格局已經轉變仍為時過早，畢竟黃金今年以來仍上漲近 20%。但比特幣這波異軍突起的強勢表現需要加以解釋。FxPro 的 Alex Kuptsikevich 指出，比特幣的復甦部分歸功於全球市場的支撐，因為在川普發表伊朗衝突即將結束的言論後，交易員紛紛搶進抄底。
這種搶購潮與其說是避險，不如說是（可能為時過早的）押注地緣政治緊張局勢即將緩和。其韌性仍然顯著。ByteTree 的 Charlie Morris 指出，如同 Bitcoin，軟體是虛擬的，而戰爭提醒人們，數位世界比現實世界更能抵禦破壞。兩者的關聯性近幾個月已有所增強。
若這一趨勢持續，軟體產業因 AI 顛覆擔憂而產生的連鎖反應，或許預示著 Bitcoin 後續的走向。 @parisprogram

items.title: ⚠️ Germany’s longer-dated bonds will stay under pressure in the short term, weighed down by the…
items.content:
⚠️ Germany’s longer-dated bonds will stay under pressure in the short term, weighed down by the drop in Treasuries and a repricing of the inflation premium in the euro area.

The yield on 10-year bunds has shot up 30 basis points since the Iran war started and is now at the highest since 2023. But the increase is fundamentally different from moves seen in the front end. German two-year yields have climbed due to the repricing of the OIS curve, where traders have gone from pricing a tail risk of a rate cut from the European Central Bank to factoring nearly two hikes by year-end.
The bund yield, though, has moved one-for-one with Treasuries, underscoring once again their traditionally strong correlations. German 10-year bonds have been trading at a premium of about 25 basis points to comparable Treasuries after their yields are adjusted with a currency swap, and a comparable margin has prevailed in recent days.

I expect some of that margin to be eroded in the coming weeks as traders re-assess the inflation risk premium they need from holding German securities. The European Union has warned that inflation could surpass 3% should Brent crude stay around $100 a barrel and gas prices stay elevated. Given the bottlenecks prevailing in the Strait of Hormuz, it seems likely that there will be no quick re-set to disrupted supply, suggesting that price pressures will be uncorked again.

Should those fears prove well-founded in the coming days, traders will act to price in a 10-15 basis point inflation risk premium into bunds, which well send yields even higher.
德國長天期債券短期內將持續承壓，受到美國公債下跌以及歐元區通膨溢價重新定價的拖累。10 年期德國公債殖利率自伊朗戰爭爆發以來已飆升 30 基點，目前處於 2023 年以來最高水準。但這波漲勢與短天期債券的走勢有著根本性的差異。
德國兩年期公債殖利率因 OIS 曲線重新定價而攀升，交易員原先對歐洲央行（ECB）降息的尾部風險進行定價，如今則計入年底前將近兩次升息的可能性。然而，德國公債（bund）殖利率與美國公債（Treasuries）呈現一比一的連動，再次凸顯兩者傳統上高度相關的特性。
德國 10 年期公債在經過貨幣交換調整殖利率後，相較於可比較的美國公債（Treasuries）一直享有約 25 個基點的溢價，而近幾日也維持著類似的利差。我預期未來幾週這部分利差將會被侵蝕，因為交易員將重新評估持有德國證券所需的通膨風險溢價。
歐盟警告，若布蘭特原油維持在每桶 100 美元左右且天然氣價格持續居高不下，通膨可能突破 3%。鑒於荷莫茲海峽目前存在的瓶頸，供應中斷似乎不太可能迅速恢復，這意味著價格壓力將再次釋放。
倘若這些擔憂在未來幾天證實確有其事，交易員將會採取行動，把 10-15 基點的通膨風險溢價計入德國公債（bunds）價格，這將進一步推升殖利率走高。 @parisprogram

items.title:
There is little relief in sight for the euro.

Commodity prices can come to the fore as the pri…
items.content:
There is little relief in sight for the euro.

Commodity prices can come to the fore as the primary driver of FX during shocks and that’s exactly what we’re seeing today. Europe is facing a negative terms-of-trade shock: a sharp rise in import prices is eroding real income, weighing on growth while simultaneously lifting inflation.
The shock is amplified by dollar strength. Because most commodities are priced in dollars, when it strengthens Europe’s import bill mechanically increases, just as the US terms of trade are improving.

Although inflation has prompted markets to price in ECB hikes this year, tighter policy has failed to offer sustained currency support. Rate increases do little to repair the external imbalance and instead risk amplifying the growth drag.

The market’s hesitancy to price a prolonged conflict, alongside strong demand for euros over the past year as an anti-dollar liquidity play, means there are still significant long positions to unwind. As the terms-of-trade shock intensifies, that positioning overhang leaves scope for further depreciation.
歐元短期內難見喘息。大宗商品價格可能在市場震盪時躍居為匯率的主要驅動因素，而這正是當前所見的情況。歐洲正面臨負面的貿易條件衝擊：進口價格急遽上漲正在侵蝕實質所得，拖累經濟成長，同時又推升通膨。美元走強更放大了這項衝擊。
由於大多數商品以美元計價，當美元走強時，歐洲的進口成本便會機械性上升，而美國的貿易條件則同步改善。儘管通膨已促使市場押注 ECB（歐洲央行）今年將升息，但緊縮政策未能為歐元帶來持續支撐。升息對於修復外部失衡幾無助益，反而可能加劇成長拖累。
市場遲遲不願對長期衝突進行定價，加上過去一年歐元作為反美元流動性操作而需求強勁，意味著仍有大量多頭部位有待平倉。隨著貿易條件衝擊加劇，這類部位過度累積將為進一步貶值創造空間。 @parisprogram

items.title: European natural gas has opened higher by 7% as prices catch up to the latest supply disruption…
items.content:
European natural gas has opened higher by 7% as prices catch up to the latest supply disruptions in the Middle East.

Expectations of ECB tightening are also continuing to ratchet higher with 45bps of hikes prices by year-end versus 39bps yesterday. As we saw yesterday, members on the Governing Council such as Peter Kazimir gave credence to such expectations. For now, markets are looking through attempts by European governments to stem the rise in energy and food prices with measures seen as piecemeal in comparison to the disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.

As such, front-end bonds in Europe look set to be marked down further, even after German and UK two-year yields rose 13 and 14bps respectively on Wednesday. Meanwhile, equity futures in Europe are lower across the board with Germany’s DAX a preferred index to sell given its heavy weightings towards industrials, which are set to be squeezed by rising input costs.

The FTSE 100 remains resilient with the futures contract steady this morning and the cash index still up 4.3% year-to-date.
歐洲天然氣開盤上漲 7%，因價格追趕中東最新供應中斷的影響。市場對 ECB（歐洲央行）緊縮政策的預期也持續攀升，年底升息幅度預期達 45 基點，相較昨日的 39 基點有所上調。正如我們昨日所見，管理委員會成員如 Peter Kazimir 也為這類預期提供了支持。
目前市場對歐洲各國政府試圖遏制能源與食品價格上漲的措施不以為然，認為這些措施相較於荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）中斷所帶來的衝擊顯得零星片段。因此，歐洲短天期債券看來將進一步遭到拋售，即便德國與英國兩年期公債殖利率週三分別已上漲 13 與 14 基點。
與此同時，歐洲股市期貨全面走低，其中德國 DAX 指數因工業股權重較高而成為首選做空標的，這類板塊勢將因投入成本上升而承受壓力。FTSE 100 指數則維持韌性，其期貨合約今晨持穩，現貨指數今年以來仍上漲 4.3%。 @parisprogram

items.title: ⚠️ The price to insulate portfolios from the prospect of higher inflation in the UK will climb…
items.content:
⚠️ The price to insulate portfolios from the prospect of higher inflation in the UK will climb yet higher.

The cost to pay a fixed rate on a two-year zero-coupon inflation swap has surged 60 basis points since the Iran war started, but even at the current level of 3.96%, the contract doesn’t adequately reflect the intensity of price pressures the UK’s economy is likely to face.

Retail-price inflation, the key measure for inflation traders in the UK, was already elevated at 3.8% in January. And with oil and natural-gas prices having shot up more than any central bank had forecast at the start of the year, the earlier guidance on inflation for most economies is now effectively obsolete.

Already, domestic petrol prices have shot up the most since 2022, bringing the government under pressure to review its fuel duty policy. Chancellor Rachel Reeves has said it’s too early to know where fuel costs will be, effectively shrugging off that pressure.

The increase in fuel costs is inflationary in itself, and a supply-side shock that affects pump prices also tends to have second-round effects in the economy, with vendors passing on the increase to consumers.

While traders have swung back again on Bank of England pricing, and no longer see the prospect of rate cuts this year, they are hardly factoring in any meaningful tightening. If the central bank were to act in line in with that market pricing, inflation swap rates will head much higher in the coming months.
英國投資組合對抗通膨升溫風險的避險成本將進一步攀升。兩年期零息通膨交換合約的固定利率支付成本自伊朗戰爭爆發以來已飆升 60 基點，但即便目前處於 3.96% 的水準，該合約仍未能充分反映英國經濟可能面臨的物價壓力強度。
英國零售價格通膨是通膨交易員關注的關鍵指標，1月已達3.8%的較高水平。隨著原油與天然氣價格漲幅超越各國央行年初預測，多數經濟體先前發布的通膨財測現已實質失效。國內汽油價格已創下2022年以來最大漲幅，政府面臨檢討燃油稅政策的壓力。
英國財政大臣 Rachel Reeves 表示，目前尚難預料燃油成本將走向何方，實際上等於對這項壓力不予理會。燃油成本上漲本身就具有通膨性質，而影響加油站價格的供給面衝擊，通常也會對經濟產生連帶效應，廠商會將漲價轉嫁給消費者。
儘管交易員對 Bank of England 的定價預期再次轉向，不再預期今年會有降息，但他們幾乎沒有將任何有意義的緊縮政策納入考量。若該央行按照市場定價採取行動，通膨交換利率將在未來數月大幅攀升。 @parisprogram

items.title: Stoxx 50 futures are already down 0.6% as Brent crude jumps back up to around $100 a barrel aft…
items.content:
Stoxx 50 futures are already down 0.6% as Brent crude jumps back up to around $100 a barrel after Oman cleared all ships from its key export terminal outside of the Strait of Hormuz and two tankers were attacked in Iraqi waters. Meanwhile, Chinese refiners have reportedly begun canceling agreed refined fuel export cargoes. European traders will be aware of how similar sessions have played out: natural gas futures follow oil higher at the open, the market responds with a flurry of hawkish policy bets and the region’s assets flounder.

Asian stocks and US equity futures are lower too. The mood won’t be helped by news that the Trump administration has started the first of several sweeping trade investigations that set the stage for new tariffs. At the same time, private credit concerns are mounting after Morgan Stanley and Cliffwater capped withdrawals from their private credit funds after investors sought to redeem vastly more than the vehicles allow.

Treasuries are steady, with US 10-year yields flat near 4.23%. The Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index rises 0.2%, with the Aussie at the bottom of the G-10 pile having outperformed on Wednesday. The yen is only a smidge lower at 159 per dollar but is getting closer to the 159.45 level that prompted a so-called rate check in January by the Federal Reserve. Precious metals and Bitcoin also slide.

Five Things You Need to Know to Start Your Day: Europe
Stoxx 50 期貨已下跌 0.6%，因布蘭特原油價格回升至每桶約 100 美元，此前阿曼已將其位於荷莫茲海峽外的主要出口碼頭所有船隻清空，且有兩艘油輪在伊拉克水域遭到攻擊。同時，據報導中國煉油商已開始取消已議定的成品油出口貨物。
歐洲交易員對於類似盤勢如何發展已經相當熟悉：天然氣期貨在開盤時隨油價上漲，市場隨之湧現一連串鷹派政策押注，而該地區資產則陷入低迷。亞洲股市與美國股指期貨同樣走低。川普政府已啟動多項大規模貿易調查中的第一項，為新關稅鋪路，這項消息也將令市場情緒雪上加霜。
同時，在 Morgan Stanley 與 Cliffwater 限制旗下私募信貸基金贖回後，市場對私募信貸的疑慮正在升溫，起因是投資人申請贖回的金額遠超過基金所允許的範圍。美國公債走勢持穩，10 年期美債殖利率持平於 4.23% 附近。Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index 上漲 0.2%，澳幣在 G-10 貨幣中表現最差，此前該貨幣於週三曾大幅領漲。
日圓兌美元僅小幅走低至 159，但正逐漸逼近 159.45 的價位，該水準曾在 1 月促使 Federal Reserve（聯準會）進行所謂的匯率檢查。貴金屬與比特幣亦同步下滑。歐洲開市前五大要聞 @parisprogram

items.title: ⚠️ The presence of India’s central bank in the markets will merely damp the rupee’s volatility,…
items.content:
⚠️ The presence of India’s central bank in the markets will merely damp the rupee’s volatility, but there’s little chance of altering the currency’s weakening profile in the coming months.

The Reserve Bank of India is in the onshore market to support the currency, Bloomberg reports. The central bank has a war chest of more than $700b, enough to stage a major intervention if it had to.

However, given the multiple headwinds facing the economy — surging oil prices in a nation reliant on imports to meet the bulk of its needs, a likely worsening in terms of trade, and global investors continuing to withdraw funds from domestic equities — the RBI may decide that prudence is the better part of valor.
Traders will parse a read-out of India’s inflation for February later today. While it may be little immediate consequence to the currency markets, the data is nevertheless likely to illustrate price pressures that beset the economy even before the Iran war began.

Where the rupee will ultimately settle over the next few months will come down to the scale of the inflation pass-through stemming from a likely increase in fuel prices, but it would be fair to say that the journey is far from complete.
印度央行（Reserve Bank of India）在市場上的干預僅能緩和盧比的波動性，但未來幾個月扭轉該貨幣走弱趨勢的可能性微乎其微。據 Bloomberg 報導，印度央行正在在岸市場支撐該貨幣。該央行擁有超過 $700b 的外匯存底，若有必要，足以進行大規模干預。
然而，鑑於印度經濟面臨的多重逆風——包括這個依賴進口滿足大部分需求的國家油價飆漲、貿易條件可能惡化，以及全球投資人持續撤出國內股票資金——RBI（印度央行）可能會認為審慎才是上策。交易員將於今日稍晚仔細研讀印度2月通膨數據。
儘管這對貨幣市場可能不會立即產生重大影響，但這項數據仍可能反映出早在伊朗戰爭爆發前就已困擾經濟的物價壓力。未來幾個月盧比最終將落於何處，將取決於燃料價格可能上漲所帶來的通膨傳導效應規模，但可以公平地說，這段過程遠未結束。 @parisprogram

items.title: 🟢 The Australian dollar’s resilience in the face of the Middle East conflict is being fostered…
items.content:
🟢 The Australian dollar’s resilience in the face of the Middle East conflict is being fostered by an assessment the country’s central bank is likely to deliver three straight rate hikes to start this year. Rates traders are strongly positioned for the RBA to raise rates next week, and the steepness of the OIS curve signals that such a move would spur bets on a follow-up increase in May.

Following on from February’s rate hike -- and RBA messaging that subsequent tightening was on the menu -- the market pivoted to price in ~75% chances for an increase on March 17 now that the Iran war sent oil prices surging. The OIS contract for the May meeting shows 36bps priced in. That could be taken as indicating about 50% odds for a hike that month, but it’s much more likely traders would rapidly switch to seeing another increase as a done deal.

A number of major local banks are already forecasting that back-to-back-to-back scenario. Which would mean the RBA would end up fully unwinding the 6-month easing cycle that concluded last August in the space of just three months this year.
The Australian dollar would be likely to make further gains on top of its 7% surge this year with investors pushed to adjust their expectations by that sort of policy determination.
澳幣在中東衝突中展現韌性，市場評估該國央行今年開局可能連續三次升息。利率交易員強烈押注 RBA（澳洲央行）將於下週升息，而 OIS 曲線的陡峭程度顯示，此舉將刺激市場押注五月再次跟進升息。
繼 2 月升息之後——加上 RBA（澳洲央行）釋出後續緊縮政策仍在規劃中的訊息——市場轉向押注 3 月 17 日有約 75% 的升息機率，因伊朗戰爭導致油價飆漲。5 月會議的 OIS 合約已反映 36 基點的升息預期。
這可能被解讀為暗示當月升息機率約為 50%，但交易員更有可能迅速轉而認為再次升息已成定局。多家主要本地銀行已預測會出現連續三次升息的狀況。這意味著 RBA（澳洲央行）將在短短三個月內，完全扭轉去年 8 月結束的為期 6 個月降息週期。
澳幣今年已飆漲 7%，隨著投資人被迫因應這類政策決心而調整預期，該貨幣很可能進一步走升。 @parisprogram

items.content:
European equities are facing a rough day as oil prices climb again and from more angst in the private credit space.

With the US dollar staying firm on the back of $100 oil prices, Euro stoxx futures are weaker Thursday in line with the path of EUR/USD, which is a signal of more downside to come. Moreover, there is a warning in the read across from slumping bank stocks in Japan, even though the Euro Stoxx banks gauge is already down more than 11% since its February peak.

For the Euro Stoxx 50 which has fallen for six days this month already, it would take a big positive surprise from the Middle East to prevent another losing day.
歐洲股市面臨艱困的一天，因油價再度攀升，且私募信貸領域的憂慮加劇。隨著美元在油價突破 100 美元之際持續走強，Euro Stoxx 期貨週四走弱，與 EUR/USD 的走勢一致，這預示著後市可能進一步下探。
此外，即便 Euro Stoxx 銀行類股指數自 2 月高點以來已下跌逾 11%，日本銀行股的重挫仍帶來警訊。對於本月已連跌六日的 Euro Stoxx 50 指數而言，除非中東地區傳出重大正面消息，否則恐難避免再度收黑。 @parisprogram

Silver is losing support amid a firmer US dollar and oil, which suggests that macro traders are expanding their field in terms of defensive reactions. That is a warning to gold which has been resilient as a haven play during this Middle East conflict.

Even though central bank bids underpin the yellow metal it can get caught up in widespread risk reduction as seen during its swoon last week when gold briefly dipped below $5,000. The deterioration in sentiment on Thursday is starting to recall the mood seen when the war first started.
白銀在美元與油價走強之際失去支撐，顯示總體經濟交易員正擴大其防禦性反應的領域。這對黃金而言是一項警訊，儘管黃金在此波中東衝突期間作為避險資產表現強韌。即便央行買盤支撐這種黃色金屬，黃金仍可能陷入大規模風險降溫的浪潮，如同上週金價一度跌破 $5,000 時的暴跌走勢所見。

items.title: South Korean equities are lower as headlines on the Iran conflict continue to erode confidence.…
items.content:
South Korean equities are lower as headlines on the Iran conflict continue to erode confidence. With Brent crude again topping $100 a barrel, the persistence of higher oil prices alongside a firmer US dollar leaves little room for Korean stocks -- as well as broader Asian equities -- to decouple from the energy shock at present.

As Brendan Fagan argued, the market pattern since the conflict began has been consistent: oil higher, the dollar stronger, and yields rising. As energy prices climb, global dollar liquidity tightens, leaving riskier assets in energy‑importing economies particularly exposed. That vulnerability is evident in Korea in particular, where the rolling correlation between the Kospi and Brent futures has shifted sharply negative since the conflict broke out.
Flows reinforce the concern. Foreign funds net sold more than $11b of Korean equities since Feb. 27, while retail investors have continued to buy. In parallel, the iShares MSCI South Korea ETF attracted $1.6b last week, the third‑largest inflow among all ETFs. That divergence keeps the Korean market on increasingly unstable footing.
南韓股市下跌，因伊朗衝突相關頭條新聞持續削弱市場信心。隨著布蘭特原油再度突破每桶100美元，高油價持續居高不下，加上美元走強，目前南韓股市乃至更廣泛的亞洲股市，幾乎沒有空間能夠脫離能源衝擊的影響。
正如 Brendan Fagan 所指出，自衝突爆發以來的市場走勢始終如一：油價上漲、美元走強、殖利率攀升。隨著能源價格上揚，全球美元流動性趨緊，使能源進口經濟體的風險資產特別容易受到衝擊。
這種脆弱性在韓國尤其明顯，自衝突爆發以來，Kospi 指數與 Brent 期貨之間的滾動相關性已急劇轉為負值。資金流動進一步加劇了這項擔憂。自 2 月 27 日以來，外資基金淨賣出超過 $110 億的韓國股票，而散戶投資人則持續買進。與此同時，iShares MSCI South Korea ETF 上週吸引 $16 億資金流入，在所有 ETF 中排名第三。
這種分歧使韓國市場的基礎日益不穩。 @parisprogram

items.title: The sight of the global crude benchmark back in three-digit figures is rippling across Asia’s e…
items.content:
The sight of the global crude benchmark back in three-digit figures is rippling across Asia’s equities as markets extend declines. That’s a move that can extend significantly because the surge in oil prices also stands as a warning of supply shocks for natural gas and fertilizers that have particular potency for many of the region’s major economies.

The steep and volatile climb for crude prices is the most visible result of the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz. While the world has become less dependent on oil than it once was, the Persian Gulf remains a key hub for global trade.

There’s also been an increase in the role that natural gas plays, given the pivot in previous years toward the fuel as a potentially cleaner alternative to oil and coal for electricity production. Natural gas is also vital for fertilizer producers, especially after the Russian invasion of Ukraine disrupted major sources for natural gas and potash.

All of which means the Gulf conflict threatens to boost inflation and slow economic growth across Asia.
全球原油基準價格重回三位數的態勢正在亞洲股市蔓延，市場跌幅持續擴大。這波走勢可能進一步加劇，因為油價飆漲同時也預示著天然氣與肥料的供應衝擊，而這對該地區多數主要經濟體具有特別重大的影響力。
原油價格的急劇且劇烈波動上漲，是荷姆茲海峽實質封閉最顯而易見的結果。儘管全球對石油的依賴程度已不如以往，波斯灣仍是全球貿易的關鍵樞紐。此外，天然氣的角色也有所提升，鑑於過去數年轉向該燃料作為發電的潛在更清潔替代方案，以取代石油與煤炭。
天然氣對化肥生產商同樣至關重要，尤其是在俄羅斯入侵烏克蘭導致天然氣和鉀肥的主要供應來源中斷之後。這一切意味著，波斯灣地區的衝突恐將推升通膨，並拖累亞洲整體的經濟成長。 @parisprogram

items.content: 布蘭特原油與 WTI 原油的隱含波動率已飆升至 2020 年以來最高水準，而次月買權偏斜度更被形容為 2015 年有數據以來最為看多。隨著市場對衝突持續時間的押注拉長，期間價差正持續下滑。相對強弱指標等技術面訊號正快速轉換型態——這是強制性調整倉位的典型跡象，往往由演算法驅動策略所造成，進而產生由新聞標題驅動的流動性缺口。

items.content: 煉油廠對極端溢價感到猶豫，紛紛削減運轉率，並轉向替代來源，包括俄羅斯供應、不同品級的浮倉原油，以及日益動用的戰略庫存。成品油市場同樣吃緊，航空燃油尤其嚴重受創——迫使歐洲與亞洲航空公司加收附加費。這是一個風險管理比方向性押注更為重要的市場。

items.title: 針對 IEA 這項舉措，市場在缺乏細節的情況下無法對其影響進行定價。釋油步調、持續時間、儲油地點，以及原油與成品油之間的分配比例，將決定實際的經濟衝擊。感謝 Grant Smith、Nayl…
items.content:
針對 IEA 這項舉措，市場在缺乏細節的情況下無法對其影響進行定價。釋油步調、持續時間、儲油地點，以及原油與成品油之間的分配比例，將決定實際的經濟衝擊。感謝 Grant Smith、Nayla Razzouk、Jack Wittels 與 Ewa Krukowska 提供資訊。

與此同時，實體市場的壓力正在蔓延。部分地區的價差與近月溢價大幅擴大，而其他地區則因運費成本沉重，壓縮了套利機會。

items.content: 荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）仍是市場的首要驅動因素——無論對原油還是其他資產而言。這與現有多少桶石油無關，而是關乎有多少石油能夠安全且穩定地通過這個通常承運全球約 20% 海運石油的咽喉要道。這正是為何 WTI 油價維持在 90 美元以上，儘管美國動用其戰略石油儲備（SPR），且國際能源署（IEA）同意釋出創紀錄的 4 億桶石油。
